raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, On my Home Depot credit card ( issued by Citibank ) two charges were made for the exact same amount {$1000.00}. This is while I was on vacation in XXXX the card in question was in my possession. Once I returned from vacation, on XX/XX/XXXX, I saw the charges when I downloaded my accounts into XXXX. I immediately filed a dispute claim on both charges and was told to shred the card. ( Which I did ). 
On XX/XX/XXXX I received a letter in my account stating I opened a fraud claim. 
On XX/XX/XXXX I received a letter that my claim was closed. 
Only one of the charges was refunded in the account. I called back again to ask about the 2nd charge and was told that they had to reopen my case. 
I have not received any correspondence that my case was re-opened. I have called multiple times and have been passed to the security department. Which when trying to speak with them, I can not hear them as their microphones are mumbled and can not be heard clearly, I have escalated to supervisors and have been told to FAX in an escalation. 
Since my balance had been {$0.00}, and these are fraudlelent charges, I was told I was not responsible for them nor late fees. I have not paid the bill, Now my my credit line has been reduced, and negative reports are now landing on my credit report ( I check frequently ). Citibank is not resolving this issue.
